$schema: This file is the authoritative map of Archive.org collection identifiers to Archive Watch categorization metadata. Edited by hand; read by both the browser catalog generator (js/build-catalog.js) and the Swift CollectionRegistry (ios/Models/Taxonomy.swift). Add a collection entry when we start surfacing it in a shelf; keep weights honest because the content classifier uses the highest-weight collection to pick a ContentType when an item belongs to multiple.

feature_films.description: Public-domain feature-length films from the pre-1978 American corpus and beyond.

classic_tv.description: Vintage American broadcast television — comedies, dramas, westerns, variety.

classic_cartoons.description: Pre-1970 animated shorts. Fleischer, Terrytoons, Famous Studios, Van Beuren.

silent_films.description: Pre-1928 silent cinema, American and international.

prelinger.description: Rick Prelinger's landmark collection of ephemeral, industrial, and educational film.

newsandpublicaffairs.description: Newsreels, press conferences, and public-affairs programming.

sci-fi_horror.description: Genre feature films — Universal originals, B-movie classics, Cold War paranoia.

film_noir.description: Mid-century American crime melodrama — shadows, cigarettes, wrong decisions.

moviesandfilms.description: Umbrella collection for moving-image media. Very broad — prefer more specific sub-collections when possible.

fedflix.description: Federal government films released via Public.Resource.Org.

nasa.description: NASA mission footage, educational films, and public-affairs reels.

academic_films.description: University teaching films, lectures, and educational shorts.

computerchronicles.description: Stewart Cheifet's 80s–90s PBS series on personal computing. A time capsule.
